estimony 1

(From Dr. Liang Chaofan, a member of the True Buddha School Professor Team. After attending the Dharma ceremony hosted by Grand Master at Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall, Dr. Liang’s cervical vertebra pain, which she had been suffering for many years, improved significantly.)

Dharma brother Ho, who is not prone to exaggeration, told me that I must write this article as best as I could. This has made me quite nervous. I hope describing my personal experience in simple words will meet his standard. I beg forgiveness if I have missed anything.

I personally feel, that in this human world, sickness is the number one suffering. As I explained yesterday, I work on the computer often, writing one and a half million Chinese characters a year. This does not count the entry of data in English.

Hence, I suffer from neck pain. Actually, I have suffered this neck pain for almost ten years. It started when I was still in medical school. Medical students work hard. On Saturdays and Sundays, when other people are taking time off, we bury our heads in books. Indeed, this lowering of head over extended periods of time has caused my cervical spine to lose its physiological curvature. Gradually, it became stiff and a persistent pain started to bother me.

At that time, I have gone to visit the physiotherapy teacher at the hospital. She touched the affected area and told me that my pain was caused by a crooked fourth cervical vertebra. It was a good thing that I was young then. After pulling an all-nighter to study, I would get terrible pains in my neck that would subside after getting massage treatment and resting one to two days. This back and forth started my experiences with all kinds of massage treatments.

Later, I pursued basic medical research in the fields of pathology and physiology. I had to spend a great deal of time hunched in front of the microscope. My daily task required threading two pieces of steel wire, as fine as human hair, through vascular rings made of mouse mesenteric artery. It was very challenging. A misstep in threading would scrape off the endothelial cells, which lined the vascular ring, and I would have to end that day’s experiment prematurely.
Since I had to use the same repetitive motions every day, it further exacerbated the damage done to my spine. I continued to seek treatment for my neck pain.

One spine doctor took my X-ray and told me that the fourth and seventh cervical vertebrae and the fourth thoracic vertebra were misaligned. Coupled with the long-term strain from constantly looking down, there are signs of calcification at the cervical cartilage tissues. He gave me some symptomatic treatment, but the neck pain still flared up from time to time. I also sought physical therapy which provided some relief, but no cure. The physiotherapist even joked, “Your bones are very hard. It is very difficult to push the bones back into alignment. Strong backbone indicates the strength of character! You are definitely ranked among the top five percent of hard bones among all Asians.”

My cervical spine illness accompanied me throughout my college years until now. My current job still requires me to input a large quantity of data into the computer. This has only caused my neck pain to get worse.

Luckily, around this time, I took refuge in my root guru His Holiness Living Buddha Lian-sheng. I also suspected there might be a karmic hindrance factor to my neck pain. So, when I attended Dharma ceremonies, I would pray for blessings that would make my neck pain less severe.

Indeed, through serendipity, I met Dr. Lin, a Buddhist Chinese medicine practitioner who is extremely skilled in treating bone and joint diseases. (In my mind, Grand Master has helped me to find him.) I originally looked him up for body conditioning treatments, as my job requires frequent travels and I was not getting enough rest.

One time, while waiting in his office, I heard several old people around me discussing their own illnesses. One said that he used to have frozen shoulders, and his arms were almost immobilized from the pain. After Dr. Lin administered acupuncture, he was able to play dozens of Mahjong rounds without any problems. When I heard that, I was elated, thinking that my cervical illness may be helped, I asked Dr. Lin to give me acupuncture and orthopedic manipulation.

Dr. Lin is indeed an expert doctor. After several sessions of acupuncture treatment and rounds of herbal medicines, I found great relief from my neck pain. I went from experiencing twenty-four hours of continuous pain (whether I was sitting, walking, or lying down) to longer intervals of feeling pain-free. I felt that my neck syndrome was under control. I have learned from my medical student days that cervical vertebra illnesses won’t heal completely. It is considered extremely lucky if symptoms improve or the disease progression can be slowed. I was worried that I would be dealing with this cervical spine illness until I die. So, I went to see Dr. Lin often, and we became friends. He would joke that my shoulder muscles were so stiff that his acupuncture needles became bent.

Now I will come to the real subject. The above was just the long history of my cervical spine problems. After taking refuge in Grand Master, I started attending Grand Master’s Dharma ceremonies whenever I could. But due to laziness, I often did not actually engage in the practice. (I am shamefully an example of following theory and not praxis.)

Still, I was lucky one day to attend the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony hosted by Grand Master at the Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall. During the ceremony, Grand Master said, “Please place your hand on the area of illness. Pray to Mahottara Heruka to bless you!”

I placed my hand on my neck. At that moment, I was not feeling completely confident, since I had not done any meditation or sadhana practice daily. After the blessing session, I actually felt a warmth around the neck area, the same kind of sensations felt after Dr. Lin’s acupuncture sessions. My neck felt more and more flexible. In the past, when I turned my neck back, I would feel a tight, uncomfortable stretch. This was due to the shift in my neck vertebrae; it limited how far right my head could turn.

After the Dharma ceremony, this kind of limited flexibility was gone. It happened right on the day of the Dharma ceremony! The strain and tightness I normally felt in the neck area were gone. I felt a whole lot lighter. Eighty percent of the neck pain that had troubled me for many years actually disappeared after the Dharma ceremony. The remaining twenty percent of pain and soreness also gradually receded.

When the Dharma ceremony was over, I still had to continue working in front of the computer, with my head bent the whole time, every day for over a dozen hours each day. This went on for almost two weeks. (In one week, I finished working on an appeal project, two gynecological clinical trial proposals, two respiratory clinical trial proposals, one ophthalmological project development program, proofreading two clinical trial proposals in both Chinese and English, and other things.) But during this period, my neck pain never flared up. This was absolutely impossible in the past! From the bottom of my heart, I am greatly grateful for my root guru. Without him, none of these would have been possible!

So, every day, when I finish my work, I would say thank you to my guru. Because of him, I can complete my task with concentration and high efficiency. I am no longer distracted and worry about the neck pain. At the time of writing this essay, there is again a little soreness at the seventh cervical vertebra. But I am very satisfied with how far I’ve come. I am finally able to experience again the happiness of being pain-free in my neck!

Will my neck pain come back again? I don’t know. All I want to tell is that Grand Master’s Dharma ceremonies are very powerful. Ten long years of cervical illness that wasn’t cured by Western or traditional Chinese doctors actually was healed during Grand Master’s Dharma ceremony! What I have written is absolutely not a hyperbole. What I have written is absolutely not a hyperbole.
What I have written is absolutely not a hyperbole. This is so important, it has to be repeated three times! Grand Master is indeed a super doctor of the world!
Testimony 2
(From Lotus Yu Guo, Sweden)
Homage to Grand Master!

I returned to Sweden after attending the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony conducted by H.H. Living Buddha Lian-sheng on February 28, 2016. The last few days since my return, I discovered that the rheumatism on my left calf had been healed. For seven years, this rheumatism had flared up on overcast days. Like a small snake, the pain slithered up, down, right, and left when it struck. Now, the pain was gone!

I also had, on my chest, several lipoid lumps for seven to eight years. They have been gradually growing bigger, causing some occasional pain and itchiness. I wanted to have surgery, but I was so busy with work and didn’t have the ability to take time off. Plus, it was not easy to schedule the surgery with the hospital. But after the Dharma ceremony, I noticed the lumps under my skin stopped growing as well. In fact, they are actually slowly diminishing in size. I hope they will eventually vanish. I will keep chanting mantra!

Also, in the past, after a cold, I would normally get sinusitis. Since the Dharma ceremony, I have caught a cold, but strangely when I recovered from the cold, my nose was clearer than before. Hahaha, even my sinusitis was healed! In the past, I believed the sinusitis prevented me from doing the breathing exercises during sadhana practice. Now, I am healed. I consider this a blessing from Grand Master to help me engage in the inner practices of pranayama!
Even my stomach acid has become much better! I am in great gratitude for Grand Master’s compassion and the blessing of his supreme Dharma power!
Testimony 3
(From Lotus Dapeng, Sweden)
Twenty years’ chronic illness has vanished.
During Grand Master’s February 28th Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony, His Holiness suddenly announced:
Mahottara Heruka has given instruction to continue chanting his mantra for five more minutes for his blessing. Place the hand over the area of sickness.

I suddenly felt that this was really a golden opportunity to heal my pain. For more than twenty years, I have suffered from varicose veins. No words could describe the pain. When it struck, I could not stand up, and the pain would last several hours at a time. For more than twenty years, this pain affected my normal life as well as my spiritual practice. In the last dozen years, I have sought help from Western and traditional Chinese doctors, but the problem never went away. There were still flare-ups. After taking refuge in Buddhism, I know this is a karmic hindrance, which will accompany me for life, and it cautioned me to be mindful of precepts and practice!

So, after hearing Grand Master’s compassionate announcement, I immediately placed my hand over the afflicted area. Gazing at Grand Master, I chanted the Mahottara Heruka Mantra. For five minutes, I visualized great light shining on the area and I felt a warmth there!

When the Dharma ceremony was over, I was too busy to check if the pain still persisted. But today, I am just so ecstatic. It has been twenty-one days since the Dharma ceremony and I have returned to Sweden, there has not been any pain. This karmic chronic illness actually has vanished with the blessing of Grand Master. The yoke in my body is lifted. I am just so grateful for the supreme mercy and blessing of great divine power from Grand Master!

For two weeks, students from Sweden have attended Grand Master’s Dharma ceremonies, and we have reaped a great harvest. Grand Master has bestowed our local chapter with the name Xiu De Tang and a precious calligraphy. He also encouraged us to diligently evangelize in Sweden as the folks are simple and honest, and the place is very suitable for spiritual cultivation.

We have to practice and spread the True Buddha Dharma well. Grand Master compassionately gave our pilgrimage group from Sweden great blessings! He also hit my left shoulder five times to give me great blessings. The new venue in Sweden will work hard to practice and help to bring the Dharma to more people!
All students in Sweden send their great gratitude and appreciation to Grand Master.
Testimony 4
(From Lotus Cui Lan, a member of Federal Tantric Buddhism Chen Foh Chong in Malaysia)

I am excited and extremely grateful to the great and compassionate Grand Master. During the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony, the great, compassionate, and loving Grand Master instructed us to chant the Mahottara Heruka Mantra for five additional minutes. Everyone in attendance was asked to place their hands over the areas of illnesses. I held my own thumb, which could not bend. It had once been severed in an accident and then surgically reattached. At that time, I could feel my hand become very warm, as if the blood began circulating. Indeed, a miracle happened. I was able to bend the thumb right away. I was so moved that I broke down crying right there and then. I am so grateful for Grand Master’s compassion. This miracle is just so inconceivable!
Testimony 5
(From Liu Yihua)

I want to thank His Holiness, Mahottara Heruka, and all buddhas, bodhisattvas, and Dharma protectors. On February 28th, during the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony organized by Zhong Guan Tang at the Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall, the mantra of Mahottara Heruka was played for five minutes. My arm had been injured repeatedly since last October. After several futile visits to Chinese medical doctors and bone-setters, I still could not raise the arm. During the mantra chanting, I was able to raise the arm!
Testimony 6
(From Lotus Jingwen)

Wholeheartedly, I pay homage to Root Guru Living Buddha, Lian-sheng and Mahottara Heruka, the deity of the Dharma ceremony, and their compassionate blessing. Back then, my eyes suffered from severe pain. After receiving a blessing from the Grand Master and the Mahottara Heruka, I opened my eyes and immediately they felt bright and comfortable! My relatives and friends around me also felt immediate comfort in places that did not feel well before.

During the Dharma ceremony, I witnessed others experiencing the compassion and drawing power of the buddhas and bodhisattvas. I am so lucky that I have taken refuge in Grand Master under the guidance of my parents since I was small. That was more than twenty years ago.

No one has taught me to do this, but when I was still a child, I loved to silently chant the Root Guru Heart Mantra. Whenever there were crises, I have been able to escape unscathed. When I was small, I also loved to hover around my mom when she played the cassette tapes of Grand Master’s Discourse on the Sutra of Perfect Enlightenment. All Grand Master’s teachings are true. When I grew up, I was fortunate to marry a husband who has also taken refuge in Grand Master. Our entire family always attend every Grand Master’s ceremony. My son also loves Grand Master and the buddhas and bodhisattvas since he was small.

Thank you, Grand Master, for giving discourses and teaching the Dharma tirelessly for forty years. You are a genuine guru who has attained enlightenment and realized the Path! Om, guru, Lian-sheng siddhi hum.
May Grand Master live a long life, continue to turn the Dharma wheel and provide salvation to all beings!
Testimony 7
(From Lotus Dazhi, Malaysia)

I am a student from Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia. During the Mahottara Heruka Ceremony, when Grand Master radiated his great power, I placed my hand over my throat which had been ill for three months. Now, my throat feels much better. I also placed the other hand over the left knee which had been painful for ten years, and it also feels much better. Thank you, Grand Master and Mahottara Heruka.
Testimony 8
(From Big Eyes, Lotus Kaixin, Hong Kong)
I am a student from Hong Kong. Paying homage to Grand Master, I would like to give the following testimony:

A few days before the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony, I was hit by a car in Taichung. I had been getting ready to cross the road when a car hit my left knee cap and my right leg. It also slightly ran over my right foot. I lost total sensation from the knee cap down. Pedestrians called the police to send me to a hospital.

At the emergency room, the doctors took X-rays and later told me, after many inspections, that nothing was wrong! I was in a daze. My leg had obviously been hit and at first, I lost sensations, but two hours later, my leg started tingling. It became so painful, as if the bones there had been broken. Yet X-rays showed nothing was wrong with the bones.

But I felt like this was actually a blessing from Grand Master and the buddhas and bodhisattvas. If I had stayed at the hospital for treatment, I would definitely have missed the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony. Since the doctors found nothing wrong with my bones, they discharged me the same day.

During the Mahottara Dharma ceremony, when Grand Master asked everyone to continue chanting for five more minutes for a healing session, I also placed my hand on my right leg when chanting the mantra. Like many students present, I could feel streams of cosmic energy like electricity coursing through my entire body. The toes on my right foot, which originally could not move, started jumping on their own during the mantra chanting. At the end of the mantra chanting, the pain in my leg was completely gone! Thank you, Grand Master, for transforming a big karmic hindrance into a small one!
Testimony 9
(From Dharma sister Chen Chuanfang, U.S.A.)

After the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony, I returned to the United States. Today, on March 9, I saw my ophthalmologist, and he said the conjunctivitis in my left eye has been healed. There’s no more infection and the tear ducts are working again. Thank you, Grand Master, for your blessing. I am so happy! Grand Master’s divine power, blessing, and compassion are so incredible! Thank you!
Testimony 10
(From Sherry, Malaysia)

When Grand Master was introducing the honored guests, I had to use the bathroom. (At that time, the line at the women’s bathroom was very long, so I ran into the men’s bathroom. I was afraid to have missed Grand Master’s teaching.) When I came out of the bathroom, I saw Grand Master bestowing blessings on everyone. I thought to myself, “How come Grand Master has already finished teaching and started giving empowerment?” I was at a loss…

Then I noticed everyone still sitting on their seats, so I hurried back to my own seat and sat down. Grand Master was still blessing everyone, so I sat quietly, chanting the Mahottara Heruka Mantra. I then felt a force speaking to me, “Where are you feeling sick? Put your hand there. Root Guru is blessing you.” I immediately placed my hands all over the areas of illness on my body and prayed to Grand Master, Mahottara Heruka and the Hundred Peaceful and Wrathful Deities, and Golden Mother to remove my illnesses, karmic defilements, and bestow me with stability, wisdom, and liberation. I kept on praying. Afterwards, I asked people around me what had happened. It was then I realized we had just received five incredible minutes of blessing.

In a dream, that same night, I was holding the Padmakumara Mudra and chanting the Guru Heart Mantra. I saw five colored threads blessing my head, and the karmic enemies and creditors in my body were pulled out of my crown. In the dream, I was struggling in anguish, and my enemies and creditors were being pulled out of my brow-point. I kept on crying until I woke up. The second night, I dreamt of attending a fire offering for Usnisa-vijaya Buddha-Mother, and I was holding a double vajra as offering into the fire. On the third night, I dreamt of Grand Master in a Dharma ceremony, and he asked me to fetch him the Eight Waters as offering. Grand Master also pat my lower back, which chronically experienced pain. When I woke up, the back pain was gone. It was indeed an incredible and remarkable Dharma ceremony. I am extremely grateful for this blessing from the guru!
Testimony 11
(From Que Hui Ling, Taiwan)

Grand Master is also a real estate agent! This was what had happened. I have a house with two master bedrooms in Keelung. On March 5, my tenant told me that his boss had transferred him to work in Taipei starting March 10, and he needed to move out on March 9. On March 10, I cleaned up the house and placed a rental advertisement on March 11. On March 12, Saturday, at 10am and 11am, two groups of people came to look at the apartment. One was a newlywed couple and they were willing to pay the first six months’ rent all at once.

The second group was two ladies who wanted to use the house for childcare, taking care of four children under three years old. Coincidentally, one of the nannies took a look at the bookcase and saw the book Meeting Benefactors I had placed there. She said the author was her teacher.

I asked her, “Are you also a True Buddha School student?” She then said it was her father who had taken refuge for thirty years. She said she had been looking for a right house for six months and had not found one satisfactory. Her friend said, “She is very sensitive. Sometimes after walking into a house, she would feel dizzy and everything swirling around her.” Since she is a True Buddha student, when she attended the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony on February 28, she prayed to Grand Master to find her a suitable house.
What a coincidence!
Today, she signed the rental lease. I plan to travel to Seattle on June 13. I was worried the house would still be vacant. Now, I feel a great relief.
Testimony 12
(From Dharma brother Xu)

This is a belated testimony. On February 28, during the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony, Grand Master said, “Keep chanting the Mahottara Heruka Mantra for five more minutes, and you can touch the areas of illness or discomfort, and you will get well.”
At that time, I turned to my wife and said, “The entire body is sick. Where should I touch? Let me visualize myself sitting on a lotus of fire to burn myself up!”

Then I suddenly thought of my mother-in-law’s words: “A long-lived and healthy Grand Master can help more people.” (Also, Grand Master himself has said that he would not pray to buddhas and bodhisattvas for his own sake.) So right away I prayed to Mahottara Heruka to bless Grand Master so his body will forever be eighteen years old. How wonderful! I was praying for Grand Master’s health, yet my own health problems were healed!

I had had hemorrhoids surgery, which resulted in blood vessels bleeding and led to heart-related problems. Now the pain is no more. It has been two weeks that my hemorrhoids have not bled, and my health is slowly recovering. Grand Master is indeed divine and the True Buddha Dharma is indeed Ichiban!
Testimony 13
(From Lotus Zhongxing, Hong Kong)

I often have fascia inflammation in my soles. I weigh more than 100kg, and my shoe size is only seven and a half. I was not an obese child, nor do I have big bones. When I was in high school, I loved playing soccer and was accustomed to getting my ankles sprained. The pain would come when I walked outdoors or pushed wheelchairs around. I have had to carry medicinal bandages around with me for the pain.

When I attended this past Lunar New Year Dharma ceremony, I forgot to bring the medicinal bandages. On the first night after arrival in Taichung, the tendons in my feet were swollen and I had to soak my feet in hot water to relieve the pain.

After breakfast at 8:00 a.m. the next day, I had to walk around for twelve hours before I could sit down for dinner. That night when I returned to the hotel, I was so tired and my feet so painful that even hot water soaking did not provide any relief. At 6:30 a.m. on the third morning, I tried my best to massage my feet before other activities. But, during the high-speed rail connection walk, I could hear on every step the cracking sound from my bursting tendons!

When we ran into Grand Master on the high-speed rail, the meeting was a bit like getting a light dose of energy. But by the time I got to the venue and sat down, any slight movement of the feet was painful again. I still had to check into my hotel room before noon. Dharma sister Sherry accompanied me to go to the hotel, but it was obvious that I was struggling with every step.

I was lucky to find a shuttle right at the exit of Xinyi Road. The driver was someone I knew, brother Lin Kuihong! He took me to the hotel at Park Road and refused to take any payment from me. After putting down the heavy luggage, I went to the Breeze Underground Mall and had a curry udon bowl before heading back to the Memorial Hall to meet with Dharma brother Guoxing.

Before the start of the Dharma ceremony, the tendon pain had already spread to my waist. I tried not to make any noise to disturb others, but every three to five minutes, I had to shift my sitting posture, or massage the feet.

Finally, I could not hold it anymore. As soon as the liturgical part of the Dharma ceremony was over, I stood up and walked to the periphery of the venue to stretch my back. At that time, Grand Master was making some divination and announced that the mantra should be played for five minutes. So, I went back to my seat. I’m definitely not bragging now, but after several minutes, all the pain in my feet and the soreness in my back completely vanished. Grand Master’s blessing is so great!

Dharma brother Guoxing was sitting next to me, and I told him everything. Later, we walked amidst the crowd under the empowerment banners and circumambulated the stupa. In the evening, we went with Dharma brother Jimmy and many other beautiful people to have dinner until midnight. During this time, I did not feel any pain. This morning I got up at 6:00 a.m. and came home at 3:30 p.m., I looked at both my feet, and the tendons were still swollen, but they did not hurt like before, just a little soreness. Let me tell you, my guru is Living Buddha Lian-sheng! Every word I have written is real. No fibbing at all!
Testimony 14
(From Lotus Tianzhu)
What a lucky thing it is to be one of the fifty thousand attendants!

On February 3, 2016, I was lucky to have dinner with Grand Master. When Grand Master gave everyone a blessing, I really wanted to ask him to especially bless my stomach. Just as Grand Master described, “Improper living and eating habits impact one’s health negatively.” I have had a chronic acid reflux problem, but I was afraid to bother Grand Master for something so minor. Also, being a woman, I did not want to impose any difficulty on Grand Master. So, even when he came up to me, I did not say anything.

That same night, I dreamt of a young and beautiful Taoist providing consultation in a marketplace. Curiously, I went up to look. She took one look at me and pushed me back with her hand on my stomach. She said, “Breathe out the filthy qi still inside.” I then blew out a swirl of black qi and felt a stream of electricity entering my entire body.

This all happened in a flash. I was about to shout at her angrily, “Who are you? How dare of you to bless me without my permission and disrupting my lineage…” But, as soon as I uttered the first word, I stopped. A magnetic field had started to wrap around me. It was so familiar, exactly like the same magnetic field I felt the night before when I had dinner with Grand Master.

Strangely, when I woke up from the dream, the chronic reflux problem was gone. Could it be that the Dharma protectors and dakinis around Grand Master knew of my thoughts that day and had given me a blessing in the dream? I don’t know the answer. But I was grateful for the result.

Although my reflux healed, it’s not easy to change one’s eating habits. In fact, because the reflux was gone, I started eating everything, especially foods that used to give me troubles, such as teas, coffees, and bread. As a result, the reflux came back on February 28. At the end of the worship section of the Dharma ceremony, my mouth had filled with the aftertaste of stomach acid. The taste slowly sapped the strength of my meditation. I regretted not bringing some medicine with me. All I had with me was tea, which only worsened the problem.

Just as I was wondering what to do, Grand Master announced, “The deity has given instruction for everyone to continue chanting the Mahottara Heruka Mantra. Please place your hand over the area of illness. There will be a healing.” Wow! Such a healing session for fifty thousand students present was unprecedented. Everyone was shocked to hear it and broke into great applause!

The first thought that occurred to me was: We should convince Grand Master not to do such a thing. Why take on everyone’s karma? The most important and beneficial thing for sentient beings is for the Buddha to continue living in the world! But, I observed that Grand Master made a spiritual divination with his fingers before making that announcement. So, Grand Master was sure of it. Upon seeing it, I was full of confidence and placed my hand over my stomach.

Today, I swear that everything I wrote is true. Just as Grand Master said, “Minor illnesses will immediately be healed!” The reflux flare-up that day due to my improper eating vanished into thin air. Even the sour taste in my mouth disappeared completely!

Praise to Grand Master’s great divine power! Also, great gratitude to Grand Master’s boundless compassion! To encounter Grand Master’s nectar of Dharma teaching is as rare as a blind turtle encountering a wood floating in the sea. It is even rarer to receive such great healing power from the Grand Master! I will cherish my health and be diligent in my practice. May I have the affinity to be close to Grand Master in future lives and to pay back! May Grand Master stay above my crown forever!
Testimony 15
(From Wang Guansheng)

The old injury on my left shoulder had troubled me for a long time. After blessings from Grand Master and Mahottara Heruka, the severe soreness incredibly disappeared. I am very grateful for Root Guru His Holiness Living Buddha and Mahottara Heruka’s blessing.

I also want to give testimony to another happening. At the arrival of Grand Master to the venue, above the sky pigeons lined up flying in a pattern to welcome him. It was hard to believe if one had not seen it personally. I personally experienced these two events. Thank you, Grand Master. I will be more diligent in my practice of guru devotion, treasuring the Dharma, and actual practice!
Testimony 16
(From Dharma Brother Fan Zijian of Penang, Malaysia)

First of all, I would like to thank Grand Master and Mahottara Heruka’s blessing. On February 28, I was in Penang watching online the broadcast of the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony. When Grand Master compassionately announced we chant Mahottara Heruka Mantra for an additional five minutes and to touch upon the area of illness, I was very excited and placed my hand over my lower back. Several days ago, I had hurt my back and the muscle was sore. After seeing a doctor and taking pills for it, there was still some pain.

Unexpectedly, once the mantra chanting commenced, I felt as if I had been electrified by the heart mantra and could not control my tears, which streamed down my face. But, I continued to chant the mantra loudly with a focused mind. When the chanting was over, I touched my back and was surprised to find that the muscles there were no longer stiff or in pain. I also felt very relaxed. What a remarkable thing!

The next afternoon, I got another good news. An electronic company from the United States of America suddenly asked me to interview for an engineer position that they claimed was suitable for me. The strange thing was I had never applied for any job in this company. These were possible due to the remote blessings of Grand Master and Mahottara Heruka.
Testimony 17
On March 2, His Holiness Living Buddha Lian-sheng disclosed this:

During the day of the Dharma ceremony, when attendants were asked to place their hands over the areas of illness during the five minutes of mantra chanting, an individual (who was not a refuge student) happened to be riding on a bus in the vicinity. This person had a neck tumor, which was still present in the morning when he shaved. When the bus was passing by the Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall, this person heard the mantra chanting and suddenly found a stream of energy flowing through his affected neck area.

He was actually on the way to the hospital for an examination, but when he got checked at the hospital, the neck tumor was nowhere to be found. Then it occurred to him his experience on the bus might have something to do with it. Later, he found a True Buddha student who told him, “It was a Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony presided by Grand Master!”
Testimony 18
(From Lotus Yijing, Taipei)
I came down with the flu right before Chinese New Year. I had a lot of phlegm in my throat which I was unable to cough out. Actually, I have had this discomfort in my throat for more than a year.

That day, during the ceremony, after blessings by Grand Master and Mahottara Heruka, I felt a continuous flow of warm energy throughout my body. Upon completion of the mantra, my throat discomfort improved immediately and I was able to spit out the phlegm stuck in my throat.
Testimony 19
(From Lotus Yuanyin, Taoyuan, Taiwan)

On the day of the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony, while chanting the Mahottara Heruka Mantra, I put my hand over the chest with a focused mind. Due to a cold, I had a lot of phlegm in my lungs and throat areas, causing great discomfort. The medicine I took also caused me to experience urinary retention. When I got home after the ceremony, I was suddenly able to smoothly pee out a lot of fluid. The next morning, I was able to breathe normally during the great homage and did not feel any more phlegm. I felt totally fine. Grand Master, thank you for your great blessing!
Testimony 20
(From Huang Fengyi, Taitung, Taiwan)

Before attending the Dharma ceremony, I have prayed in my heart to Grand Master to bless and heal the various injuries and pains in my body. I am a laborer who has worked hard, and in my early years, I experienced great injuries, including internal ones. I also suffered from rheumatism and gout. I signed up as a volunteer worker for the ceremony.

After Grand Master announced to help everyone and, once the mantra sound started, I visualized and placed my hands over the afflicted areas. A magical thing happened! In the past, whether I was working or resting, the internally damaged bones, tendons, and muscles would always be aching. Even taking pain pills could not suppress the pain completely. After Grand Master’s blessing in this Dharma ceremony, more than fifty percent of all my aches and pains were gone, especially the internal pains and gout! I am greatly thankful to Grand Master for healing the pains I have had for over twenty years.
Testimony 21
(From Lotus Mingru)

I am not sure if this is considered a testimony to healing, but I am grateful to Grand Master’s compassionate intervention. After attending the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony, the next night I had a dream. Someone was standing at the end of my bed, and my entire body was frozen and not under my command. It was as if that person had trapped my body. So, I chanted, “Om, guru, Lian-sheng siddhi hum. Om, bie-zha, zhuo-da, ma-ha-seh, xi-li, he-ru-ka, humpei.” Immediately, my immobilized body was able to move again. How remarkable!
Testimony 22
(From Lotus Guangzhong, Sarawak, Malaysia)

I originally had a big soft rubbery bump on the back of my left hand, under my skin, near the wrist. After the February 28 Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony, with the blessing of Grand Master and Mahottara Heruka, the benign tumor was gone.

Right after the blessing ceremony, I did not pay attention to the lump on my hand. Then, the next morning when I was going to apply some lotion, I realized the tumor was gone. I had planned to get some medical consult to have the growth excised, but now it has disappeared! I thought I could only witness such miracles happening to other fellow students, I had not expected this to happen to me too. Here I pay homage to Root Guru, Samantabhadra Tathagata, Mahottara Heruka, and the Hundred Peaceful and Wrathful Deities.
Testimony 23
(From Lotus Xinyi, Singapore)

I am obese and often felt a tightness in my chest. Especially when my job became too stressful, I would start panting. Ever since that miraculous five minutes healing session, the tightness in my chest is gone! I am so grateful! Also, since that Dharma ceremony, I can walk very fast. Even my friends say they cannot catch up with my pace. Ha! Regardless, I would observe what Grand Master has taught: eat less, take less salt, sugar, oil, MSG, and do more exercise. Thank you for everything. All these are true.
Testimonies 24
(The following was compiled by Master Huijun.)

On Sunday, February 28, 2016, at 2pm, H.H. Living Buddha Liansheng presided over a Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony at the Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall in Taipei. It was the first transmission of empowerments for Hundred Peaceful and Wrathful Deities and the Great Liberation through Hearing in Bardo.

What made the event very special was when, at the end of the Dharma ceremony, Grand Master immediately announced, “I just received revelation from Mahottara Heruka that we will chant the Mahottara Heruka Mantra again for five minutes. Place your hand on the area of illness, and He will bless you for a healing!” (So, people attending carried that out, and Grand Master also compassionately blessed everyone and invoked Mahottara Heruka, Golden Mother, and other deities to bless everyone to recover from their illnesses.)
That day, His Holiness told several of his personal attendants that this time many students would experience miracles.
The next day, I welcomed people to write their testimonies to us on Facebook. In just two days, we received many testimonies. It was indeed very miraculous!
Lotus Lizhen said:

“When attending the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony, I had the flu and was producing thick and yellow phlegm. So, I was coughing a lot. Although I was wearing a mask the whole time to prevent the spread of the virus to other people, my coughs were so uncomfortable and also disturbing others during the ceremony.
When I heard the healing session, I immediately placed my hand on my throat and focused on chanting the mantra. I also visualized great white light shining on my throat to stop the phlegm and cough.

Indeed, after Grand Master’s great blessing, I was coughing a lot less. After empowerment, I only experienced very light coughing, only two or three times occasionally. The next day, I felt much better, no more thick phlegm or occasional coughing, and I did not need to wear a mask when I went out. As long as one has faith, Grand Master’s blessing will be effective! Thank you, Grand Master, for removing the pain of sickness!”
From Lotus Yuqing:

During Sunday’s Mahottara Heruka Mantra chanting, I placed my hand on my throat, and I could feel a lot of phlegm coming out. I also faintly felt something like a needle’s presence there. Soon after the chanting, these sensations were gone. My occasional dry coughing is also healed! I am very grateful for Grand Master and Mahottara Heruka’s blessing. True Buddha Dharma is indeed miraculous!
From Lotus Menghua:

When I heard Grand Master’s announcement of the healing session for five minutes, I was surprised and also thankful. After the five minutes’ blessing, my itchy throat and dry cough suddenly became a productive cough. After two expectorations, my throat no longer itched and I coughed much less.
From Datuk Li Haian of Malaysia:

I want to thank the great and compassionate Grand Master. Yesterday at the Mahottara Heruka Dharma ceremony, Grand Master announced that we should place our hands over the areas of illness during the five minutes’ chanting of Mahottara Heruka Mantra. Like all the students, I followed the instruction and touched my throat and my lungs area. The next morning when I woke up, my wife said, “How come I did not hear you coughing last night at all?” As it turned out, the one-month-old cough had been healed by Grand Master’s blessing during the mantra chanting. How remarkable! I am filled with infinite gratitude!
From Shi Mu, Master Lianxiang:

It is really remarkable! After arriving in Taiwan, I had been coughing due to an air pollution allergy. Yet, after Grand Master’s announcement for us to place our hand over the area of illness while the Mahottara Heruka Mantra was being chanted, I placed my hand on my throat. Afterwards, my cough indeed disappeared without taking any medicine. This is indeed a very pleasant surprise. Grand Master’s words are indeed true!
From Fujen Lin:
Om, guru, Lian-sheng siddhi hum.
I am so grateful for Grand Master’s compassion!

I would like to share an experience I had. Today after the Dharma ceremony, I brought home three pieces of a sitting mat that had been blessed by Grand Master. After placing them on the floor, I was going to just lie down to take a rest. Unexpectedly, I fell asleep for one and a half hour, from eight thirty to ten pm. To me, this was a big deal because I normally have trouble falling asleep and suffer from poor quality sleep. These “vajra sitting mats” are just wonderful!
From Lili Duong:

Two days before the Dharma ceremony, I came down with abdominal pains, like the kind caused by food poisoning. After the Dharma ceremony, I completely recovered. This is the second day, and when my friends asked me how my pain was, it dawned on me that it was gone. Thank you, Grand Master and Mahottara Heruka.

So, apart from testimonies from those present at the venue, there were also testimonies from people watching the broadcast online, and from someone who was not a student just passing by. There are just too many to be recorded… Also, many people that day felt the strong energy present during the mantra chanting. Many others did not have time to submit their testimonies!
When Grand Master was bestowing the empowerments, stunning and auspicious clouds appeared in the sky. Many people photographed the beautiful clouds on their cameras. It was a strange phenomenon.

That day, Grand Master said, “Many people will definitely experience miraculous healings!” It turned out to be true! It demonstrates the great accomplishment of His Holiness Living Buddha, Lian-sheng and the great compassion of the deity Mahottara Heruka and all buddhas and bodhisattvas!
In gratitude, we pay homage to them all and may everything be auspicious and perfect!
